mapper.select: select c.* from course_member cm join course c on cm.course_id = c.id where cm.user_id = #{studentId} and cm.member_role = 'STUDENT' and cm.status = 1 and c.status = 1 order by c.created_at desc
select * from course where teacher_id = #{teacherId} and status = 1 order by created_at desc
select * from course where id = #{id} and status = 1
select * from course where course_code = #{code} and status = 1
mapper.insert: insert into course_member(id, course_id, user_id, member_role, join_type, status) values (UUID_SHORT(), #{courseId}, #{userId}, 'STUDENT', #{joinType}, 1) on duplicate key update status = 1, join_type = values(join_type)
insert into course_member(id, course_id, user_id, member_role, join_type, status) values (UUID_SHORT(), #{courseId}, #{teacherId}, 'TEACHER', 'CREATE', 1) on duplicate key update status = 1
